title: fagara glandulosa
intro: Fagara glandulosa, also known as Szechuan pepper or Japanese pepper, is a plant species native to East Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus trees. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its unique combination of compounds, including capsaicin-like molecules, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fagara glandulosa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Fagara glandulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oils, dried flowers, or infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or added to food as a spice.
